name: claudetalk
description: Connect Claude Code to DingTalk - chat with Claude Code via DingTalk bot

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/channels/feishu && cp src/channels/feishu/context-message.template dist/channels/feishu/ && mkdir -p ~/.claudetalk/feishu && cp src/channels/feishu/context-message.template ~/.claudetalk/feishu/ && mkdir -p ~/.claudetalk && cp agent_auto_config.json ~/.claudetalk/
